name: donjon-fall-ui
description: donjon-fall-ui — game UI component library built on top of TkajUI. Warm medieval gold palette, ornament SVGs (RohOrnament, SideOrnament, HexOrnament, …), HUD layout, gameplay primitives (Dialogue, ChoicePanel, RewardPopup, AchievementToast, LevelUp), and a full suite of Donjon* variants that extend the TkajUI counterparts with gold borders and octagonal ornaments.
